case_title: INA YOSUN CHANG VS. 41 TEHAMA L.P.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG, INA YOSUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P. $4,551.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,551.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,753.71 FILED BY CHANG, INA YOSUN AS TO DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE*** NO SIGNATURE SERVED NOV-18-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-23-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. CONTINUED DUE TO MEDICAL ISSUE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF INA YOSUN CHANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA L.P. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DEBORAH LUNN, SENIOR COMMUNITY MANAGER & AGENT FOR OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2022 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, INA YOSUN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-02-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDENT INFORMED THE COURT OF MEDICAL ISSUE. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG ALLOWS FOR A 1 MONTH CONTINUANCE. SERVICE ISSUES ARE WAIVED BY DEFENDANT'S ORAL REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. SPOKE WITH WITH PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
